name: get_board
description: Get detailed information about a specific Monday.com board by its ID. Returns the board's columns, groups, items count, subscribers, and settings. Useful for understanding a board's structure before creating or updating items.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: GraphQL query string to fetch a specific board by ID.
parameters.example: { boards (ids: [1234567890]) { id name columns { id title type settings_str } groups { id title } } }

parameters.name: board_id
parameters.description: The numeric ID of the board to retrieve (used inside the GraphQL query).

body.query: { boards (ids: [1234567890]) { id name description columns { id title type settings_str } groups { id title color } items_count subscribers { id name email } } }
